name: Lord Gaia the Fierce Knight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガイアロード
desc: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn, if a monster(s) with ATK higher than this card is Special Summoned to your opponent's field (except during the Damage Step): You can make this card gain 700 ATK until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn, if a monster(s) with ATK higher than this card is Special Summoned to your opponent's field (except during the Damage Step): You can make this card gain 700 ATK until the end of this turn.
